full_name: Hot rolled products of structural steels - Part 1: General technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: General technical delivery conditions common to all parts of EN 10025; applies to flat and long hot rolled structural steel products for welded, bolted and riveted structures. Excludes hollow sections and tubes.

full_name: Hot rolled products of structural steels - Part 2: Technical delivery conditions for non-alloy structural steels
scope_summary: Non-alloy structural steel grades S235, S275, S355, S450 with quality subgrades JR/J0/J2/K2 defining impact toughness. Covers chemical composition, mechanical properties, tolerances and delivery conditions.

full_name: Hot rolled products of structural steels - Part 3: Technical delivery conditions for normalized/normalized rolled weldable fine grain structural steels
scope_summary: Normalized (N/NL) weldable fine grain structural steels, grades S275N to S460NL, for improved toughness at low temperatures.

full_name: Hot rolled products of structural steels - Part 4: Technical delivery conditions for thermomechanical rolled weldable fine grain structural steels
scope_summary: Thermomechanically rolled (M/ML) weldable fine grain structural steels, grades S275M to S460ML, offering low carbon equivalent and good weldability.

full_name: Hot rolled products of structural steels - Part 5: Technical delivery conditions for structural steels with improved atmospheric corrosion resistance
scope_summary: Weathering steels (grades S235W, S355W etc., e.g. J0W/J2W/K2W) with improved atmospheric corrosion resistance via a protective patina.

full_name: Hot rolled products of structural steels - Part 6: Technical delivery conditions for flat products of high yield strength structural steels in the quenched and tempered condition
scope_summary: High yield strength quenched and tempered (Q) flat structural steels, grades S460Q to S960Q, for demanding structural applications.

full_name: Stainless steels - Part 1: List of stainless steels
scope_summary: Master list of standardized stainless steel grades with chemical compositions and reference physical properties; classifies ferritic, martensitic, austenitic and duplex grades.

full_name: Stainless steels - Part 2: Technical delivery conditions for sheet/plate and strip of corrosion resisting steels for general purposes
scope_summary: Delivery conditions, mechanical properties and surface finishes for stainless steel flat products (sheet, plate, strip) for general corrosion-resisting applications.

full_name: Stainless steels - Part 3: Technical delivery conditions for semi-finished products, bars, rods, wire, sections and bright products of corrosion resisting steels for general purposes
scope_summary: Delivery conditions and mechanical properties for stainless steel long products (bars, rods, wire, sections).

full_name: Aluminium and aluminium alloys - Chemical composition and form of wrought products - Part 3: Chemical composition and form of products
scope_summary: Defines the EN AW-xxxx numeric designation system and chemical composition limits for wrought aluminium alloys (e.g. EN AW-6061, EN AW-5083).

full_name: Aluminium and aluminium alloys - Extruded rod/bar, tube and profiles
scope_summary: Technical conditions, dimensional tolerances and mechanical properties for extruded aluminium rod, bar, tube and profiles (multi-part: general, mechanical properties, tolerances).

full_name: Aluminium and aluminium alloys - Sheet, strip and plate
scope_summary: Technical conditions, mechanical properties and tolerances for aluminium sheet, strip and plate (multi-part: technical conditions, mechanical properties, tolerances on shape/dimensions).

full_name: Aluminium and aluminium alloys - Castings - Chemical composition and mechanical properties
scope_summary: Chemical composition and mechanical property requirements for aluminium alloy castings (EN AC-xxxxx designations), covering sand, permanent mould and die casting.

full_name: Hot finished steel structural hollow sections of non-alloy and fine grain steels - Part 1: Technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: Hot finished (hot formed and normalized) structural hollow sections (square, rectangular, circular) in non-alloy and fine grain steels; delivery conditions, composition and mechanical properties.

full_name: Cold formed welded steel structural hollow sections of non-alloy and fine grain steels - Part 1: Technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: Cold formed welded structural hollow sections in non-alloy and fine grain steels; thinner walls and tighter tolerances than hot finished EN 10210.

full_name: Steels for quenching and tempering - Part 1: General technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: General delivery conditions for quenched and tempered steels achieving high strength via quenching from above AC3 followed by tempering (parts 2 non-alloy, 3 alloy steels).

full_name: Copper and copper alloys - Rod for general purposes
scope_summary: Technical delivery conditions, composition and mechanical properties for copper and copper alloy rod for general purposes (e.g. CW614N CuZn39Pb3).

full_name: Copper and copper alloys - Rod for free machining purposes
scope_summary: Technical delivery conditions for copper alloy rod optimized for free machining, including leaded brasses such as CW614N (CuZn39Pb3).

full_name: Founding - Spheroidal graphite cast irons
scope_summary: Specifies grades and mechanical requirements for spheroidal (nodular) graphite cast irons classified by properties on machined test pieces (e.g. EN-GJS-400-15, EN-GJS-500-7). Covers ferritic to pearlitic and solid-solution strengthened ferritic grades.

full_name: Founding - Grey cast irons
scope_summary: Specifies grades of unalloyed and low-alloyed lamellar (flake) graphite grey cast iron, classified either by tensile strength (e.g. EN-GJL-250) or by Brinell hardness, measured on machined test pieces from cast samples.

full_name: Continuously hot rolled low carbon steel sheet and strip for cold forming - Technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: Specifies grades (DD11, DD12, DD13, DD14) of continuously hot rolled low carbon steel sheet and strip for cold forming, thickness ~1.0-11 mm, with delivery conditions, composition and mechanical/formability requirements.

full_name: Cold rolled low carbon steel flat products for cold forming - Technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: Specifies technical delivery conditions for cold rolled flat products of unalloyed low-carbon steel for cold forming (grades DC01-DC06), including chemical composition, mechanical properties and surface quality.

full_name: Hot rolled flat products made of high yield strength steels for cold forming - Part 2: Technical delivery conditions for thermomechanically rolled steels
scope_summary: Thermomechanically rolled (M) high yield strength micro-alloyed steels for cold forming, grades S315MC to S960MC (yield ~315-960 MPa), thickness ~1.5-20 mm; widely used in automotive structural parts.

full_name: Steel rod, bars and wire for cold heading and cold extrusion - Part 1: General technical delivery conditions
scope_summary: General delivery conditions for round rod, bars and wire for cold heading and cold extrusion (fasteners). Multi-part: Part 2 non-heat-treated, Part 3 case hardening, Part 4 quench-and-temper, Part 5 stainless steels.

full_name: Steels and nickel alloys for fasteners with specified elevated and/or low temperature properties
scope_summary: Specifies semi-finished products, bars and rods for fasteners (bolts, studs, nuts) with properties defined at elevated and/or low temperatures, in non-alloy, alloy, stainless steels and nickel alloys.

full_name: Copper and copper alloys - Forgings
scope_summary: Specifies composition, property requirements and dimensional/form tolerances for copper and copper alloy die and hand forgings, plus sampling, test methods and delivery conditions.

full_name: Copper and copper alloys - Seamless, round tubes for general purposes
scope_summary: Specifies composition, property requirements and tolerances for seamless round drawn copper and copper alloy tubes for general purposes, ~3-450 mm outside diameter and 0.3-20 mm wall thickness.

full_name: Copper and copper alloys - Plate, sheet, strip and circles for general purposes
scope_summary: Specifies composition, property requirements and tolerances on dimensions/form for copper and copper alloy plate, sheet, strip and circles for general purposes (e.g. CuZn37/CW508L), with sampling and delivery conditions.
